Container.Name: llama-server
Container.Overview: llama.cpp HTTP server with Vulkan GPU acceleration. OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions endpoint, built-in WebUI, works on any GPU with Vulkan drivers — AMD (no ROCm needed), Intel Arc, NVIDIA. [br]Point LLAMA_ARG_MODEL at a GGUF file in the Models dir. Set LLAMA_ARG_N_GPU_LAYERS=999 to offload everything to GPU. Strix Halo / unified-memory APUs can run 70B-class models thanks to shared VRAM. [br]Download GGUF models into the Models path from HuggingFace (e.g. bartowski/* or unsloth/* repos).
Container.Description: llama.cpp server with Vulkan backend. All tuning via LLAMA_ARG_* env vars — no custom PostArgs needed. For AMD Strix Halo / RDNA 3.5, Vulkan matches or beats ROCm on gfx1151 as of 2026 and requires no driver install.

Config.Name: HTTP / API
Config.Description: OpenAI-compatible API and built-in WebUI. POST /v1/chat/completions; GET / for the WebUI.

Config.Name: Models
Config.Description: GGUF model files. Download into this dir with wget/curl from HuggingFace. Point LLAMA_ARG_MODEL at a file inside /models.

Config.Name: LLAMA_ARG_MODEL
Config.Description: Container path to the GGUF file to load. Example: /models/Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct-Q5_K_M.gguf

Config.Name: LLAMA_ARG_N_GPU_LAYERS
Config.Description: Layers to offload to GPU. 999 = all (recommended). Lower only if the model doesn't fit in VRAM.

Config.Name: LLAMA_ARG_CTX_SIZE
Config.Description: Context window in tokens. Bigger = more VRAM. 8192 is a safe default; push to 32768+ on large-memory hosts.

Config.Name: LLAMA_ARG_FLASH_ATTN
Config.Description: 1 = enable flash attention (faster, less memory). 0 = disable. Some older GGUFs require 0.

Config.Name: LLAMA_ARG_HOST
Config.Description: Bind address. Leave as 0.0.0.0 for container networking.

Config.Name: LLAMA_ARG_PORT
Config.Description: HTTP server port inside the container. Must match the HTTP / API port mapping above.

Config.Name: LLAMA_ARG_THREADS
Config.Description: CPU threads for non-offloaded work. Blank = auto (physical core count). Override only when sharing CPU with other heavy containers.

Config.Name: LLAMA_ARG_API_KEY
Config.Description: Optional bearer token required on all API requests. Blank = unauthenticated (fine on a trusted LAN).
